   430→    switch (providerKey) {
   431→      case 'anthropic':
   432→        return !!this.clients.anthropic;
   433→      case 'openai':
   434→      case 'openai_vision':
   435→      case 'openai_tts':
   436→      case 'openai_whisper':
   437→      case 'openai_embed':
   438→        return !!this.clients.openai;
   439→      // All NIM providers require NIM API key
   440→      case 'nim_nemotron_super':
   441→      case 'nim_kimi':
   442→      case 'nim_deepseek_v3':
   443→      case 'nim_deepseek_v3_1':
   444→      case 'nim_step_flash':
   445→      case 'nim_gpt_oss':
   446→      case 'nim_nano':
   447→      case 'nim_mistral_small':
   448→      case 'nim_qwen_72b':
   449→      case 'nim_deepseek_r1':
   450→      case 'nim_qwq':
   451→      case 'nim_cosmos':
   452→      case 'nim_nemotron_vl':
   453→      case 'nim_kimi_vision':
   454→      case 'nim_gemma_vision':
   455→      case 'nim_riva_tts':
   456→      case 'nim_magpie_multilingual':
   457→      case 'nim_magpie_flow':
   458→      case 'nim_magpie_zeroshot':
   459→      case 'nim_fastpitch':
   460→      case 'nim_parakeet_v2':
   461→      case 'nim_parakeet_v3':
   462→      case 'nim_embed_qa':
   463→      case 'nim_embed_vl':
   464→      case 'nim_rerank_qa':
   465→      case 'nim_rerank_vl':
   466→      case 'nim_safety_guard':
   467→      case 'nim_safety_reasoning':
   468→        return this.nimAvailable;
   469→      // Self-hosted providers — CPU-based, no API keys
   470→      case 'selfhosted_tts':
   471→        return this.selfHostedTTSAvailable;
   472→      case 'selfhosted_stt':
   473→        return this.selfHostedSTTAvailable;
   474→      // Deepgram providers — independent TTS/ASR fallback
   475→      case 'deepgram_tts':
   476→      case 'deepgram_stt':
   477→        return this.deepgramAvailable;
   478→      default:
   479→        return false;
   480→    }
   481→  }
   482→
   483→  // ─── Circuit Breaker ──────────────────────────────────────────
   484→
   485→  isCircuitOpen(providerKey, modality) {
   486→    const key = `${providerKey}:${modality}`;
   487→    const failure = this.failures[key];
   488→    if (!failure) return false;
   489→
   490→    const elapsed = Date.now() - failure.lastFailure;
   491→    if (elapsed > CIRCUIT_BREAK_MS) {
   492→      // Circuit closed — enough time passed, allow retry
   493→      delete this.failures[key];
   494→      return false;
   495→    }
   496→    return true;
   497→  }
   498→
   499→  recordFailure(providerKey, modality, error) {
   500→    const key = `${providerKey}:${modality}`;
   501→    const existing = this.failures[key] || { count: 0 };
   502→    const status = error.status || error.statusCode || null;
   503→
   504→    this.failures[key] = {
   505→      count: existing.count + 1,
   506→      lastFailure: Date.now(),
   507→      error: error.message || String(error),
   508→      status,
   509→    };
   510→
   511→    this.stats.totalFailovers++;
   512→
   513→    const logEntry = {
   514→      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
   515→      event: 'provider_failure',
   516→      provider: providerKey,
   517→      modality,
   518→      error: error.message || String(error),
   519→      status,
   520→    };
   521→    this.logs.push(logEntry);
   522→    if (this.logs.length > 100) this.logs.shift();
   523→
   524→    console.log(`[ai-provider] ❌ ${providerKey} failed for ${modality}: [${status || 'ERR'}] ${error.message || error}`);
   525→  }
   526→
   527→  _logFailover(fromProvider, toProvider, modality) {
   528→    const logEntry = {
   529→      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
   530→      event: 'failover',
   531→      from: fromProvider,
   532→      to: toProvider,
   533→      modality,
   534→    };
   535→    this.logs.push(logEntry);
   536→    if (this.logs.length > 100) this.logs.shift();
   537→    console.log(`[ai-provider] 🔄 ${modality} failover: ${fromProvider} → ${toProvider}`);
   538→    activityLogger.logFailover(modality, fromProvider, toProvider);
   539→  }
   540→
   541→  recordSuccess(providerKey, modality, tokenCount = 0) {
   542→    this.activeProviders[modality] = providerKey;
   543→    const key = `${providerKey}:${modality}`;
   544→    delete this.failures[key];
   545→
   546→    this.stats.totalCalls++;
   547→    this.stats.providerCalls[providerKey] = (this.stats.providerCalls[providerKey] || 0) + 1;
   548→
   549→    // Track OpenAI token usage for budget enforcement
   550→    if (this._isOpenAIProvider(providerKey) && tokenCount > 0) {
   551→      tokenBudget.recordUsage(modality, tokenCount);
   552→    }
   553→  }
   554→
   555→  isRetryable(err) {
   556→    // Network/timeout errors
   557→    if (err.code === 'ETIMEDOUT' || err.code === 'ECONNREFUSED' || err.code === 'ECONNRESET' || err.code === 'ENOTFOUND') return true;
   558→    if (err.message && (err.message.includes('timeout') || err.message.includes('ETIMEDOUT'))) return true;
   559→
   560→    // HTTP status codes
   561→    const status = err.status || err.statusCode || (err.response && err.response.status);
   562→    if (status && RETRYABLE_STATUS.has(status)) return true;
   563→
   564→    // OpenAI SDK-specific error types
   565→    if (err.type === 'insufficient_quota' || err.code === 'insufficient_quota') return true;
   566→    if (err.type === 'rate_limit_exceeded' || err.code === 'rate_limit_exceeded') return true;
   567→
   568→    // Anthropic-specific
   569→    if (err.error && err.error.type === 'overloaded_error') return true;
   570→
   571→    return false;
   572→  }
   573→
   574→  // Check if a provider key is an OpenAI provider (not Anthropic, not NIM)
   575→  _isOpenAIProvider(providerKey) {
   576→    return providerKey === 'openai' || providerKey.startsWith('openai_');
   577→  }
   578→
   579→  // Get available providers for a modality (skipping unavailable + circuit-broken + budget-exhausted OpenAI)
   580→  getAvailableChain(modality, variant = 'default') {
   581→    const budgetExhausted = tokenBudget.isOpenAIBudgetExhausted();
   582→    // TTS and ASR are exempt from budget exhaustion — they use minimal tokens
   583→    // (~50-100 per TTS call, ~30-50 per ASR call) and have NO working NIM fallbacks
   584→    // (NVIDIA cloud API doesn't host audio models). Blocking them kills interviews.
   585→    const budgetExemptModalities = new Set(['tts', 'asr']);
   586→    const skipOpenAI = budgetExhausted && !budgetExemptModalities.has(modality);
   587→
   588→    return this.getChain(modality, variant).filter(key => {
   589→      if (!this.isProviderAvailable(key)) return false;
   590→      if (this.isCircuitOpen(key, modality)) return false;
   591→      // Skip OpenAI providers when daily token budget is exhausted (except TTS/ASR)
   592→      if (skipOpenAI && this._isOpenAIProvider(key)) return false;
   593→      return true;
   594→    });
   595→  }
   596→
   597→  // ─── Core Execution with Fallback ────────────────────────────
   598→
   599→  /**
   600→   * Execute an AI call with automatic fallback.
   601→   * @param {string} modality - 'llm', 'vision', 'tts', 'asr', 'embedding', 'reranking', 'safety'
   602→   * @param {Function} executeFn - async (providerKey) => result
   603→   * @param {string} variant - Chain variant (default, quality, efficient, reasoning)
   604→   * @returns {*} Result from the first successful provider
   605→   */
   606→  async execute(modality, executeFn, variant = 'default', callMeta = {}) {
   607→    const callStart = Date.now();
   608→    const chain = this.getAvailableChain(modality, variant);
   609→    const triedProviders = [];
   610→
   611→    if (chain.length === 0) {
   612→      const allChain = this.getChain(modality, variant);
   613→      const reasons = allChain.map(k => {
   614→        if (!this.isProviderAvailable(k)) return `${k}: not configured`;
   615→        if (this.isCircuitOpen(k, modality)) return `${k}: circuit open`;
   616→        return `${k}: unknown`;
   617→      });
   618→      const err = new Error(`No available providers for ${modality}. ${reasons.join(', ')}`);
   619→      // Log failed call
   620→      aiCallLogger.logCall({
   621→        module: callMeta.module || 'unknown',
   622→        feature: callMeta.feature || '',
   623→        modality,
   624→        provider: 'none',
   625→        model: '',
   626→        latencyMs: Date.now() - callStart,
   627→        success: false,
   628→        errorMessage: err.message,
   629→        fallbackChain: allChain,
   630→        userId: callMeta.userId || null,
   631→      });
   632→      throw err;
   633→    }
   634→
   635→    // Per-provider timeout: 8s for TTS/ASR, 15s for LLM, 30s for vision (multi-image), 10s default
   636→    const timeoutMs = modality === 'tts' || modality === 'asr' ? 8000
   637→      : modality === 'llm' ? 15000
   638→      : modality === 'vision' ? 30000
   639→      : 10000;
   640→
   641→    let lastError;
   642→    let failedProvider = null;  // Track from→to for failover logging
   643→    for (const providerKey of chain) {
   644→      triedProviders.push(providerKey);
   645→      try {
   646→        // Wrap each provider call with a timeout to prevent hanging
   647→        const result = await Promise.race([
   648→          executeFn(providerKey),
   649→          new Promise((_, reject) => setTimeout(() => {
   650→            const err = new Error(`${providerKey} timed out after ${timeoutMs}ms for ${modality}`);
   651→            err.code = 'ETIMEDOUT';
   652→            reject(err);
   653→          }, timeoutMs))
   654→        ]);
   655→        // Log successful failover transition if we had a prior failure
   656→        if (failedProvider) {
   657→          this._logFailover(failedProvider, providerKey, modality);
   658→        }
   659→        // Extract token count if result is wrapped with _tokenCount
   660→        let tokenCount = 0;
   661→        let actualResult = result;
   662→        if (result && typeof result === 'object' && result._tokenCount !== undefined) {
   663→          tokenCount = result._tokenCount;
   664→          actualResult = result._result;
   665→        }
   666→        this.recordSuccess(providerKey, modality, tokenCount);
   667→
   668→        // Log successful call with full metadata
   669→        const latencyMs = Date.now() - callStart;
   670→        aiCallLogger.logCall({
   671→          module: callMeta.module || 'unknown',
   672→          feature: callMeta.feature || '',
   673→          modality,
   674→          provider: providerKey,
   675→          model: callMeta.model || this._getModelName(providerKey) || providerKey,
   676→          promptTokens: Math.round(tokenCount * 0.6),
   677→          completionTokens: Math.round(tokenCount * 0.4),
   678→          totalTokens: tokenCount,
   679→          latencyMs,
   680→          success: true,
   681→          fallbackChain: triedProviders.length > 1 ? triedProviders : null,
   682→          userId: callMeta.userId || null,
   683→        });
   684→
   685→        return actualResult;
   686→      } catch (err) {
   687→        lastError = err;
   688→        // Provider not applicable for this request (e.g., voice cloning TTS without audio prompt)
   689→        // Skip silently without circuit-breaking — provider is fine, just wrong for this request
   690→        if (err.notApplicable) {
   691→          continue;
   692→        }
   693→        if (this.isRetryable(err)) {
   694→          failedProvider = providerKey;
   695→          this.recordFailure(providerKey, modality, err);
   696→          continue; // try next provider
   697→        }
   698→        // Non-retryable error — log and throw
   699→        aiCallLogger.logCall({
   700→          module: callMeta.module || 'unknown',
   701→          feature: callMeta.feature || '',
   702→          modality,
   703→          provider: providerKey,
   704→          model: callMeta.model || this._getModelName(providerKey) || providerKey,
   705→          latencyMs: Date.now() - callStart,
   706→          success: false,
   707→          errorMessage: err.message,
   708→          fallbackChain: triedProviders,
   709→          userId: callMeta.userId || null,
   710→        });
   711→        throw err;
   712→      }
   713→    }
   714→
   715→    // All providers exhausted — log failure
   716→    aiCallLogger.logCall({
   717→      module: callMeta.module || 'unknown',
   718→      feature: callMeta.feature || '',
   719→      modality,
   720→      provider: triedProviders[triedProviders.length - 1] || 'none',
   721→      model: '',
   722→      latencyMs: Date.now() - callStart,
   723→      success: false,
   724→      errorMessage: (lastError && lastError.message) || 'All providers exhausted',
   725→      fallbackChain: triedProviders,
   726→      userId: callMeta.userId || null,
   727→    });
   728→
   729→    console.error(`[ai-provider] All ${modality} providers exhausted.`);
   730→    throw lastError || new Error(`All ${modality} providers failed`);
   731→  }
   732→
   733→  // Get human-readable model name from provider key
   734→  _getModelName(providerKey) {

   761→  // ─── LLM Chat Completion ─────────────────────────────────────
   762→
   763→  /**
   764→   * Chat completion with automatic provider fallback.
   765→   * @param {Array} messages - Array of { role, content } messages
   766→   * @param {Object} options - { system, maxTokens, max_tokens, temperature, subscriptionId, response_format, module }
   767→   * @returns {string} The AI response text
   768→   */
   769→  async chatCompletion(messages, options = {}) {
   770→    // Determine chain variant based on module
   771→    const moduleConfig = MODULE_CHAINS[options.module];
   772→    const variant = (moduleConfig && moduleConfig.llm) || 'default';
   773→
   774→    // Check throttling — skip non-critical modules when budget is high
   775→    if (options.module && aiCallLogger.shouldThrottle(options.module, tokenBudget.getStatus())) {
   776→      throw new Error(`Module ${options.module} throttled — budget above threshold for priority level`);
   777→    }
   778→
   779→    return this.execute('llm', async (providerKey) => {
   780→      switch (providerKey) {
   781→        case 'anthropic':
   782→          return this._anthropicChat(messages, options);
   783→        case 'openai':
   784→          return this._openaiChat('gpt-4o-mini', messages, options, true);
   785→        case 'nim_nemotron_super':
   786→          return this._nimChat(NIM_MODELS.llm_super, messages, options);
   787→        case 'nim_kimi':
   788→          return this._nimChat(NIM_MODELS.llm_kimi, messages, options);
   789→        case 'nim_deepseek_v3':
   790→          return this._nimChat(NIM_MODELS.llm_deepseek_v3, messages, options);
   791→        case 'nim_deepseek_v3_1':
   792→          return this._nimChat(NIM_MODELS.llm_deepseek_v3_1, messages, options);
   793→        case 'nim_step_flash':
   794→          return this._nimChat(NIM_MODELS.llm_step_flash, messages, options);
   795→        case 'nim_gpt_oss':
   796→          return this._nimChat(NIM_MODELS.llm_gpt_oss, messages, options);
   797→        case 'nim_nano':
   798→          return this._nimChat(NIM_MODELS.llm_nano, messages, options);
   799→        case 'nim_mistral_small':
   800→          return this._nimChat(NIM_MODELS.llm_mistral_small, messages, options);
   801→        case 'nim_qwen_72b':
   802→          return this._nimChat(NIM_MODELS.llm_qwen_72b, messages, options);
   803→        case 'nim_deepseek_r1':
   804→          return this._nimChat(NIM_MODELS.reasoning_deepseek_r1, messages, options);
   805→        case 'nim_qwq':
   806→          return this._nimChat(NIM_MODELS.reasoning_qwq, messages, options);
   807→        default:
   808→          throw new Error(`Unknown LLM provider: ${providerKey}`);
   809→      }
   810→    }, variant, { module: options.module || 'unknown', feature: options.feature || 'chat', userId: options.userId });
   811→  }
   812→
   813→  async _anthropicChat(messages, options) {
   814→    const systemMsgs = messages.filter(m => m.role === 'system');
   815→    const nonSystemMsgs = messages.filter(m => m.role !== 'system');
   816→
   817→    const systemPrompt = options.system || (systemMsgs.length > 0 ? systemMsgs[0].content : undefined);
   818→    const msgs = nonSystemMsgs.map(m => ({
   819→      role: m.role,
   820→      content: typeof m.content === 'string' ? m.content : String(m.content),
   821→    }));
   822→    if (msgs.length === 0) msgs.push({ role: 'user', content: 'Hello' });
   823→
   824→    const response = await this.clients.anthropic.messages.create({
   825→      max_tokens: options.maxTokens || options.max_tokens || 8192,
   826→      messages: msgs,
   827→      system: systemPrompt,
   828→    }, {
   829→      headers: options.subscriptionId ? { 'X-Subscription-ID': options.subscriptionId } : {},
   830→    });
   831→
   832→    return response.content[0].text;
   833→  }
   834→
   835→  async _openaiChat(model, messages, options, isPolsia = false) {
   836→    const client = this.clients.openai;
   837→    const msgs = [];
   838→
   839→    if (options.system) {
   840→      msgs.push({ role: 'system', content: options.system });
   841→    }
   842→    for (const m of messages) {
   843→      if (m.role === 'system' && options.system) continue; // already added
   844→      msgs.push({ role: m.role, content: typeof m.content === 'string' ? m.content : String(m.content) });
   845→    }
   846→    if (msgs.length === 0) msgs.push({ role: 'user', content: 'Hello' });
   847→
   848→    const params = {
   849→      model,
   850→      messages: msgs,
   851→      max_tokens: options.maxTokens || options.max_tokens || 8192,
   852→      temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
   853→    };
   854→
   855→    // Polsia proxy requires task field
   856→    if (isPolsia) params.task = 'chat-fallback';
   857→    if (options.response_format) params.response_format = options.response_format;
   858→
   859→    const response = await client.chat.completions.create(params);
   860→    const text = response.choices[0].message.content;
   861→    // Track token usage from response or estimate
   862→    const tokenCount = (response.usage && response.usage.total_tokens)
   863→      ? response.usage.total_tokens
   864→      : tokenBudget.estimateTokensFromText(text) + tokenBudget.estimateTokensFromText(msgs.map(m => m.content).join(' '));
   865→    return { _result: text, _tokenCount: tokenCount };
   866→  }
   867→
   868→  async _nimChat(model, messages, options) {
   869→    const client = this.clients.nim;
   870→    const msgs = [];
   871→
   872→    if (options.system) {
   873→      msgs.push({ role: 'system', content: options.system });
   874→    }
   875→    for (const m of messages) {
   876→      if (m.role === 'system' && options.system) continue;
   877→      msgs.push({ role: m.role, content: typeof m.content === 'string' ? m.content : String(m.content) });
   878→    }
   879→    if (msgs.length === 0) msgs.push({ role: 'user', content: 'Hello' });
   880→
   881→    const params = {
   882→      model,
   883→      messages: msgs,
   884→      max_tokens: options.maxTokens || options.max_tokens || 8192,
   885→      temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
   886→    };
   887→
   888→    if (options.response_format) params.response_format = options.response_format;
   889→
   890→    const response = await client.chat.completions.create(params);
   891→    return response.choices[0].message.content;
   892→  }

   894→  // ─── Vision Analysis ─────────────────────────────────────────
   895→
   896→  /**
   897→   * Vision analysis with automatic provider fallback.
   898→   * @param {Array} imageUrls - Array of HTTP image URLs
   899→   * @param {string} prompt - Analysis prompt
   900→   * @param {Object} options - { maxTokens, subscriptionId, response_format, module }
   901→   * @returns {string} The AI response text
   902→   */
   903→  async visionAnalysis(imageUrls, prompt, options = {}) {
   904→    const moduleConfig = MODULE_CHAINS[options.module];
   905→    const variant = (moduleConfig && moduleConfig.vision) || 'default';
   906→
   907→    return this.execute('vision', async (providerKey) => {
   908→      let client, model;
   909→
   910→      switch (providerKey) {
   911→        case 'openai_vision':
   912→          client = this.clients.openai;
   913→          model = 'gpt-4o';
   914→          break;
   915→        case 'nim_cosmos':
   916→          client = this.clients.nim;
   917→          model = NIM_MODELS.vision_cosmos;
   918→          break;
   919→        case 'nim_nemotron_vl':
   920→          client = this.clients.nim;
   921→          model = NIM_MODELS.vision_nemotron_vl;
   922→          break;
   923→        case 'nim_kimi_vision':
   924→          client = this.clients.nim;
   925→          model = NIM_MODELS.vision_kimi;
   926→          break;
   927→        case 'nim_gemma_vision':
   928→          client = this.clients.nim;
   929→          model = NIM_MODELS.vision_gemma;
   930→          break;
   931→        default:
   932→          throw new Error(`Unknown vision provider: ${providerKey}`);
   933→      }
   934→
   935→      // Build content array with text + images
   936→      const content = [{ type: 'text', text: prompt }];
   937→      for (const url of imageUrls) {
   938→        content.push({
   939→          type: 'image_url',

  1284→  /**

  1343→        end: u.end || 0,
  1344→        text: u.transcript || '',
  1345→      })),

  1348→    };
  1349→  }

  1439→      input: truncated,
  1440→    };
  1441→    if (options.subscriptionId) params.task = 'embedding';
  1442→
  1443→    const response = await client.embeddings.create(params);
  1444→    const embedding = response.data[0].embedding;
  1445→    // Track embedding token usage
  1446→    const embedTokens = (response.usage && response.usage.total_tokens)
  1447→      ? response.usage.total_tokens
  1448→      : tokenBudget.estimateTokensFromText(truncated);
  1449→    return { _result: embedding, _tokenCount: embedTokens };
  1450→  }
  1451→
  1452→  async _nimEmbedding(model, text, options) {
  1453→    const client = this.clients.nim;
  1454→    const truncated = text.substring(0, 8000);
  1455→
  1456→    const response = await client.embeddings.create({
  1457→      model,
  1458→      input: truncated,
  1459→    });
  1460→    return response.data[0].embedding;
  1461→  }
  1462→
  1463→  // ─── Reranking ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  1464→
  1465→  /**
  1466→   * Rerank search results for quality improvement.
  1467→   * Uses NIM NV-RerankQA model to reorder candidate/job matches.
  1468→   * @param {string} query - The search query
  1469→   * @param {string[]} documents - Array of document texts to rerank
  1470→   * @param {Object} options - { topN }
  1471→   * @returns {Array} Reranked results with scores
  1472→   */
  1473→  async rerank(query, documents, options = {}) {
  1474→    if (!this.nimAvailable) {
  1475→      // No NIM = return original order with default scores
  1476→      console.log('[ai-provider] Reranking skipped (NIM not available), returning original order');
  1477→      return documents.map((doc, i) => ({ index: i, score: 1 - (i * 0.01), text: doc }));
  1478→    }
  1479→
  1480→    try {
  1481→      return await this.execute('reranking', async (providerKey) => {
  1482→        let model;
  1483→        switch (providerKey) {
  1484→          case 'nim_rerank_qa':
  1485→            model = NIM_MODELS.rerank_qa;
  1486→            break;
  1487→          case 'nim_rerank_vl':
  1488→            model = NIM_MODELS.rerank_vl;
  1489→            break;
  1490→          default:
  1491→            throw new Error(`Unknown reranking provider: ${providerKey}`);
  1492→        }
  1493→
  1494→        const topN = options.topN || documents.length;
  1495→
  1496→        // NIM reranking endpoint
  1497→        const res = await fetch(`${this.nimBaseUrl}/ranking`, {
  1498→          method: 'POST',
  1499→          headers: {
  1500→            'Authorization': `Bearer ${this.nimApiKey}`,
  1501→            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  1502→          },
  1503→          body: JSON.stringify({
  1504→            model,
  1505→            query: { text: query },
  1506→            passages: documents.map(doc => ({ text: doc })),
  1507→            top_n: topN,
  1508→          }),
  1509→        });
  1510→
  1511→        if (!res.ok) {
  1512→          const errText = await res.text();
  1513→          const err = new Error(`NIM Reranking error: ${res.status} ${errText.substring(0, 200)}`);
  1514→          err.status = res.status;
  1515→          throw err;
  1516→        }
  1517→
  1518→        const result = await res.json();
  1519→        return (result.rankings || []).map(r => ({
  1520→          index: r.index,
  1521→          score: r.logit || r.score || 0,
  1522→          text: documents[r.index],
  1523→        }));
  1524→      }, 'default', { module: options.module || 'job-matching', feature: 'reranking' });
  1525→    } catch (err) {
  1526→      console.error('[ai-provider] Reranking failed, returning original order:', err.message);
  1527→      return documents.map((doc, i) => ({ index: i, score: 1 - (i * 0.01), text: doc }));
  1528→    }
  1529→  }
  1530→
  1531→  // ─── Safety / Content Moderation ─────────────────────────────
  1532→
  1533→  /**
  1534→   * Check content for safety violations using NIM NemoGuard.
  1535→   * @param {string} content - Text to check
  1536→   * @param {Object} options - { categories }
  1537→   * @returns {Object} { safe: boolean, categories: {...}, reason: string }
  1538→   */
  1539→  async moderateContent(content, options = {}) {
  1540→    if (!this.nimAvailable) {
  1541→      // No NIM = allow all (no moderation available)
  1542→      return { safe: true, categories: {}, reason: 'Moderation not available (NIM not configured)' };
  1543→    }
  1544→
  1545→    try {
  1546→      return await this.execute('safety', async (providerKey) => {
  1547→        let model;
  1548→        switch (providerKey) {
  1549→          case 'nim_safety_guard':
  1550→            model = NIM_MODELS.safety_guard;
  1551→            break;
  1552→          case 'nim_safety_reasoning':
  1553→            model = NIM_MODELS.safety_reasoning;
  1554→            break;
  1555→          default:
  1556→            throw new Error(`Unknown safety provider: ${providerKey}`);
  1557→        }
  1558→
  1559→        // NemoGuard uses chat completions format with safety-specific system prompt
  1560→        const response = await this.clients.nim.chat.completions.create({
  1561→          model,
  1562→          messages: [
  1563→            {
  1564→              role: 'system',
  1565→              content: 'You are a content safety classifier. Analyze the following text for safety violations including: harassment, hate speech, violence, sexual content, self-harm, dangerous content, and professional misconduct. Return a JSON object: {"safe": true/false, "categories": {"harassment": false, "hate_speech": false, "violence": false, "sexual_content": false, "self_harm": false, "dangerous": false, "unprofessional": false}, "reason": "explanation if unsafe"}'
  1566→            },
  1567→            { role: 'user', content: content.substring(0, 4000) }
  1568→          ],
  1569→          max_tokens: 512,
  1570→          temperature: 0.1,
  1571→        });
  1572→
  1573→        const text = response.choices[0].message.content;
  1574→        try {
  1575→          const jsonMatch = text.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
  1576→          if (jsonMatch) return JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);
  1577→        } catch (e) { /* fall through */ }
  1578→
  1579→        // Default safe if parsing fails
  1580→        return { safe: true, categories: {}, reason: 'Safety check completed (parse fallback)' };
  1581→      }, 'default', { module: options.module || 'safety', feature: 'content-moderation' });
  1582→    } catch (err) {
  1583→      console.error('[ai-provider] Safety moderation failed:', err.message);
  1584→      return { safe: true, categories: {}, reason: 'Safety check failed (allowing by default)' };
  1585→    }
  1586→  }
  1587→
  1588→  // ─── Health Status ────────────────────────────────────────────
  1589→
  1590→  getHealth() {
  1591→    const allModalities = ['llm', 'vision', 'tts', 'asr', 'embedding', 'reranking', 'safety'];
  1592→    const modalities = {};
  1593→
  1594→    for (const modality of allModalities) {
  1595→      const chain = this.getChain(modality);
  1596→      modalities[modality] = {
  1597→        active: this.activeProviders[modality] || 'none',
  1598→        chain_depth: chain.length,
  1599→        providers: chain.map(key => ({
  1600→          key,
  1601→          available: this.isProviderAvailable(key),
  1602→          circuitOpen: this.isCircuitOpen(key, modality),
  1603→          failures: this.failures[`${key}:${modality}`] || null,
  1604→        })),
  1605→      };
  1606→    }
  1607→
  1608→    // Module-specific chain info
  1609→    const moduleInfo = {};
  1610→    for (const [module, config] of Object.entries(MODULE_CHAINS)) {
  1611→      moduleInfo[module] = {};
  1612→      for (const [modality, variant] of Object.entries(config)) {
  1613→        const chain = this.getChain(modality, variant);
  1614→        const available = chain.filter(k => this.isProviderAvailable(k) && !this.isCircuitOpen(k, modality));
  1615→        moduleInfo[module][modality] = {
  1616→          variant,
  1617→          chain_depth: chain.length,
  1618→          available_count: available.length,
  1619→          providers: chain.map(k => k),
  1620→        };
  1621→      }
  1622→    }
  1623→
  1624→    return {
  1625→      status: 'ok',
  1626→      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
  1627→      nim_configured: this.nimAvailable,
  1628→      deepgram_configured: this.deepgramAvailable,
  1629→      selfhosted_stt: this.selfHostedSTTAvailable,
  1630→      selfhosted_tts: this.selfHostedTTSAvailable,
  1631→      total_models_registered: Object.keys(NIM_MODELS).length,
  1632→      stats: this.stats,
  1633→      token_budget: tokenBudget.getStatus(),
  1634→      modalities,
  1635→      module_chains: moduleInfo,
  1636→      recent_logs: this.logs.slice(-20),
  1637→    };
  1638→  }
  1639→

   353→## 13. Comprehensive Fallback Chains Per HireLoop Module (IMPLEMENTED)
